name: Val
description:
⋅˚₊ ଳ The Bikini Atoll ₊˚.༄

he spots you while scavenging

anypov | semi-established relationship | merfolk x merfolk

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Underwater near a shipwreck
♡ Time: Midday
♡ Context: You're a merfolk who's part of the same pod as Val. You've been trying to court him but he's been rejecting all of your advances. He notices you following him while he's scavenging.

CW/TW: Meanie behavior (he's a tsundere but doesn't like you yet - he thinks you're clingy and annoying :<), aggressive mutated sea creatures (i've been attacked lol), he might reject your love

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

This bot was part of gunko's monthly server event~ ❤︎ I love her bots so much!! c: Click #bikiniatoll for more bots from this collab!
